# Adventure Tours Vernal

> Adventure Tours Vernal is a locally-owned guided UTV and side-by-side tour company in Vernal, Utah.
> Specializes in guided Kawasaki KRX 1000 tours through Dinosaur Country, backcountry trails, petroglyphs, rock art, and ancient ruins in Utah's high desert.
> Owners: Dave and Trudy Wilson. Phone: (435) 219-9447. Address: 1935 S 1500 E, Vernal, Utah 84078.
> Rated 5.0 stars from 82 Google reviews. Open daily 7am–7pm Mountain Time.
> Last Updated: March 2026

## Trail Tours & Pricing

- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/]: Doc's Beach — Sandy desert washes, open terrain, Green River corridor views. All skill levels.
- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/]: Moonshine Arch — Red rock canyons to a hidden natural sandstone arch. Scenic and historic.
- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/]: Ashley Gorge — Dramatic canyon corridor with towering sandstone walls and river valley scenery.
- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/]: Outlaw Trail — Historic backcountry route used by Butch Cassidy and the Wild Bunch.
- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/]: Asphalt Ridge — Ridge-top tour with 360-degree panoramic views of Dinosaur Country and the Uintah Mountains.
- Pricing: $299 per machine for a 3-hour guided tour (up to 2 riders per machine). $100 ride-along add-on (ride as passenger with a guide; requires at least 1 machine rental). $99/hour/machine overage for additional time. 3-person minimum, 12 guests maximum per tour.

## Fleet & Equipment

- Vehicle: Kawasaki KRX 1000 (2-seater side-by-side)
- Fleet size: 6 machines available for customers; Dave and Trudy each guide in their own KRX
- Suspension: FOX 2.5 PODIUM LSC shocks
- Safety: Full roll cage, power steering, helmets, safety briefing, and gear provided
- All skill levels accommodated with professional instruction

## About & Trust

- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/about.html]: Locally owned and operated by Dave and Trudy Wilson
- Expert local guides with deep knowledge of the Uintah Basin's backcountry
- Tours feature petroglyphs, rock art, and ruins — evidence of ancient civilization preserved in the landscape
- Access to hidden trails, historic Wild West landmarks (Butch Cassidy hideouts, Josie's Cabin)
- Natural sandstone arches without the crowds of Utah's national parks
- Fully licensed and insured
- 5.0 stars from 82 Google reviews

## Service Area

- Primary: Vernal, Utah (Uintah County)
- Near: Dinosaur National Monument, Ashley National Forest, Red Fleet State Park
- Serving: Roosevelt, Jensen, Naples, Manila (Utah), and surrounding Uintah Basin communities

## Operating Hours

- Open Daily: 7am–7pm Mountain Time
- Tours by appointment — call (435) 219-9447 or book online

## Booking

- [https://adventuretoursvernal.com/booking.html]: Book a guided UTV tour online
- Or call (435) 219-9447 — open daily 7am–7pm Mountain Time

## Lodging Partner

- Best Western Extended Stay Vernal (bestwesternvernal.com) — 10% off lodging when you mention Adventure Tours

## Notes

- Tours are weather-dependent — call ahead for conditions
- Minimum age: 18 to drive, 2 to ride as passenger
- Call (435) 219-9447 for custom group pricing and availability
